headline: High Oil Prices & Cost Discipline Boost ConocoPhillips' 2026 Outlook
summary: Surging oil prices and cost discipline position COP for a stronger 2026 outlook, as production growth adds further momentum.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower as the price of the commodity pulls back, as investors digest reports that the U.S. and Iran could meet for another round of peace talks after negotiations failed last weekend.
summary: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower as the price of the commodity pulls back, as investors digest reports that the U.S. and Iran could meet for another round of peace talks after negotiations failed last weekend.
